properties.query: select nfc_naming_code as nfc_naming_code from sdnctl.VFC_MODEL where customization_uuid=:vfccustomizationuuid
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix_id as prefix_id from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private1"
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix as prefix from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private1"
select sdnctl.VF_MODULE_MODEL.vf_module_label as vf_module_label from sdnctl.VF_MODULE_MODEL where sdnctl.VF_MODULE_MODEL.customization_uuid=:customizationid
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix as prefix from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private1"
select sdnctl.VF_MODEL.naming_policy as vf_naming_policy from sdnctl.VF_MODEL where sdnctl.VF_MODEL.customization_uuid=:vnf_model_customization_uuid
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix as prefix from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "management"
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix as prefix from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private2"
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix_id as prefix_id from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private"

select sdnctl.VF_MODULE_TO_VFC_MAPPING.vfc_customization_uuid as vnf_customid from sdnctl.VF_MODULE_TO_VFC_MAPPING where vm_count = 1 and sdnctl.VF_MODULE_TO_VFC_MAPPING.vf_module_customization_uuid=:vfmodulecustomizationuuid
select VFC_MODEL.vm_type as vm_type from VFC_MODEL where customization_uuid=:vfccustomizationuuid
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix_id as prefix_id from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "management"
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix as prefix from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private2"
select sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL.prefix_id as prefix_id from sdnctl.IPAM_IP_POOL where description = "private2"
select vf_module_type as vf_module_type from sdnctl.VF_MODULE_MODEL where customization_uuid=:customizationid
select VFC_MODEL.invariant_uuid as vfc_invariant_uuid from VFC_MODEL where customization_uuid=:vfccustomizationuuid
select VFC_MODEL.version as vnfc_model_version from VFC_MODEL where customization_uuid=:vfccustomizationuuid
